content.full_text:
City of Duarte

Sixteen Hundred Huntington Drive, Duarte, California 91010 - (818) 357-7931

January 23, 1990

California Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804-0807

Attention: Mr. John Rostman

Re: Request for Formal Written Advice

Dear Mr. Rostman:

Written advice is requested as to whether a City Councilmember, who is also the President of the City Chamber of Commerce, has a conflict of interest as a result of holding both positions.

Duarte City Councilmember, Jim Kirchner, is also the President of the Duarte Chamber of Commerce. Other councilmembers are concerned that this may bring about certain conflicts of interest for Mr. Kirchner. The President of the Chamber of Commerce receives no pay for his services. The position is entirely voluntary and gratuitous. He also does not receive any reimbursement for costs incurred as a result of his participation in Chamber activities. Mr. Kirchner is also not employed by any organization or corporation that is a member of the Chamber of Commerce. His place of employment is outside the City of Duarte.

The main concern of other Councilmembers is the fact that the City of Duarte does contract with the Chamber of Commerce for miscellaneous services and does pay the Chamber of Commerce out of its general fund annually certain agreed upon amounts. Those payments are determined by the City Council annually when developing the City's fiscal year budget. Mr. Kirchner's main concern is whether he would be allowed to participate in approving a City budget, which contains the Chamber of Commerce item or whether that particular line item must be removed and dealt with separately as a conflict issue.

d. = Brand of the original Andres Duarte Rancho

Glitch of Deepest

Calif. Fair Political Practices Commission
January 23, 1990
Page 2


Any advice you could give in this regard would be greatly
appreciated. If further information is needed, please do not
hesitate to contact me.

Very truly yours,

[signature]
JOHN F. LAWSON
City Attorney

JFL/as

cc: Jesse Duff, City Manager

[The image appears to be a blank or nearly blank page with a light yellow/cream colored background. There is no visible text or other content to transcribe.]
